summary: Lead ACCEPTS M7-SCENARIO-PERSON-EVENT-FILL-001 after independent QA R2 ACCEPT. The task fills the contracted M7 Beta scenario/person/event content path through explicit source schema, compiler, runtime pack, content validation, and tests. QA R1 requested runtime parser fixes for Human Gate/content-lock/violence-cost invariants; writer R2 repaired the parser and runtime negative tests; QA R2 accepted. This acceptance does not close the task until the branch enters origin/main and does not create formal content lock acceptance.

format, lint, typecheck, and architecture checks passed.

decisions: ACCEPTED after independent QA R2 ACCEPT; task remains not CLOSED until integration into origin/main.

Formal names, transliterations, exact historical participants, symbols, art, music, clothing, architecture, religious imagery, and content lock acceptance remain governed by later review/Human Gate tasks.
